description: Style NoteStay cool and stylish this summer in this nike T-shirt. Team this with training pants and training shoes for complete benefit during your Sports sessions or simply wear it with jeans and sports shoes and flaunt your sporty attitude.Product DetailsSunny yellow t-shirt with a round ribbed neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on print/decoration
